extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won with perfect ALPECIN lead-out timing, waiting while GANNA Filippo started sprinting early, second consecutive stage for team sprinter.
tactical_patterns: SEPULVEDA Eduardo bridged solo 1:00 gap mid-climb to secure KOM jersey, prioritizing classification over stage outcome.
ALPECIN maintained control final 5km with 2 lead-out riders still present 200m from line, allowing GROVES casual shoulder check.
GROVES delayed sprint initiation watching rivals, only responding after GANNA committed early, winning through superior timing not raw power.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: Extended GC lead to 6 seconds over MARTINEZ, already 43 seconds ahead of VINGEGAARD/ROGLIC with minimal hard racing required
rider_signals.SEPÚLVEDA Eduardo: positive: Bridged 1-minute solo gap mid-Cat 2 climb specifically for KOM points, demonstrating classification-focused aggression over stage ambition
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: Won second consecutive sprint stage by delaying effort while GANNA overcommitted early, shows tactical maturity beyond pure speed
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: negative: Lost winnable sprint by initiating too early despite superior raw power, passed GROVES after line indicating mistimed effort
